frontmatter.description: A schema migration has been running longer than the operational budget without completing

signature.embedding_seed: migration stalled long running schema change lock wait

body:
## When this fires
A migration is taking long enough to threaten the deploy or read traffic. Typical causes: an exclusive lock contended by an open transaction, a CREATE INDEX (without CONCURRENTLY) on a hot table, or a backfill scanning the full table.

## Playbook
1. Tail migration-runner-log to see what step is in flight.
2. Pull lock-blockers to identify any transaction blocking the migration.
3. Read recent-deploys-db to confirm what changed in the migration files.
